visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen layout. On the right, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige knitted vest over a white long-sleeved shirt, eats a yellow snack while holding a pink Hello Kitty cup. On the left, a smaller inset video shows a man cutting colorful pink, green, and white rice cakes into a bowl of milk. The background is a bright studio setting with a yellow clock and colorful posters. (2) The woman holds up various commercial packages of glutinous rice balls (tangyuan), including brands like Ovaltine and Sanrio-themed packs (Kuromi, Pompompurin). She points to a plate of colorful rice cakes on the screen. (3) She uses metal scissors to open a yellow carton of banana milk and a white carton of oat milk, pouring both into a large clear glass bowl. A comical sad filter is briefly applied to her face when some milk spills. (4) She adds cooked purple, white, and yellow tangyuan from a metal bowl into the milk mixture using a blue patterned ceramic spoon. She also places a large halved strawberry daifuku into the bowl. (5) The woman proceeds to taste each item. She takes large bites of the different colored tangyuan and the milk-soaked strawberry daifuku, showing the inner fillings (yellow custard, purple taro, red strawberry). Her facial expressions are highly expressive, showing surprise and delight. (6) She continues eating, holding the large glass bowl close to the camera, occasionally looking up and gesturing with her hands while describing the taste. The video ends with her looking at the camera with a satisfied expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 韓國&美國爆紅吃法 彩虹年糕加牛奶. (2) [Subtitle]: 韓國流行把年糕配牛奶吃? [Logo]: 實驗歐膩. (3) [Subtitle]: 紅到美國!!!! 可是台灣買不到那個韓國年糕! 在台灣可以找到類似的東西?! (4) [Variety]: 湯圓. 酷洛米. 還有草莓大福. (5) [Subtitle]: 我特別加了香蕉牛奶. 為什麼用香蕉牛奶? (再加一點燕麥奶). (6) [Variety]: 烙賽. (7) [Subtitle]: 再加煮好的湯圓. + 草莓大福. 湯匙什麼時候... Gwenchana. 完成. (8) [Slogan]: 焦糖布丁口味. 意外有那種流沙包的鹹蛋味道!!! 配香蕉牛奶吃鹹跟甜的比例剛好. (9) [Slogan]: 紫糯米芋泥. 芋泥味道很濃郁. 芋泥內陷是蠻豐富的耶. (10) [Slogan]: 阿華田口味. 今天吃的湯圓中口感最Q彈. (11) [Slogan]: 草莓大福. 拜託大家... 以後草莓大福一定要在牛奶泡吃喔!! (12) [Slogan]: 在牛奶泡了之後(年糕)完全入口即化了. 大家最好奇哪一個組合的口味呢?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on the right, 1 male appearing in a small insert clip on the left.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, dark brownish hair, wearing a beige cable-knit vest over a white long-sleeved shirt, with bright and expressive facial makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright studio or home setting with a white wall decorated with a yellow 'Happiness' poster, a rainbow poster, and a large orange-rimmed wall clock.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and bouncy synthesized BGM starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates in Mandarin, introducing the food trend. (2) A subtle plastic rustling sound occurs as she holds up the tangyuan packages. The BGM maintains a steady, happy tempo. (3) A sharp 'snip' sound effect triggers when she cuts the milk carton, followed by a liquid 'glug-glug' splashing sound. A comical, distorted 'sad' sound effect plays briefly when she spills the milk. (4) A metallic 'clink' is heard as the spoon hits the glass bowl while she stirs. The BGM continues without interruption. (5) Wet chewing and swallowing sounds (soft mukbang style) are audible as she tastes the glutinous rice balls. Each bite is punctuated by enthusiastic vocal reactions like 'Wow' and 'Mmm'. (6) A final 'ding' or sparkle sound effect plays as the completed dish is presented. The BGM fades out quickly as the voice asks a final question to the audience.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> Alternative Solution -> Preparation -> Tasting Review -> Engagement Call
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To test and review a viral Korean/American food trend using local Taiwanese ingredient substitutes (tangyuan instead of tteok) and share the culinary results with the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands like Kirkland and Ovaltine are visible, the content is framed as a personal experiment and review rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high density of visual and auditory 'variety show' elements (captions, SFX, emojis) to maintain high viewer engagement typical of short-form social media content.
